privileged_info_summary: The task requires adding the medical billing modifier '95' with the description 'Synchronous Telemedicine Service'. These exact values are explicitly requested in the task description and correspond to the real-world standard American Medical Association (AMA) CPT Modifier 95 for synchronous telemedicine services.
